parameters.name: entitySuffix
parameters.description: suffix for generated JPA entity classes (default: "Entity")

parameters.name: embeddableSuffix
parameters.description: suffix for generated JPA embeddable classes (default: "Embeddable")

parameters.name: repositorySuffix
parameters.description: suffix for Spring Data repository interfaces (default: "JpaRepository")

parameters.name: idStrategy
parameters.description: fallback identity generation strategy when domain fields lack

parameters.name: targetModule
parameters.description: target module for multi-module routing (null = no routing)

parameters.name: enableAuditing
parameters.description: true to add JPA auditing annotations (createdDate, lastModifiedDate)

parameters.name: generateRepositories
parameters.description: true to generate Spring Data JPA repository interfaces

parameters.name: generateMappers
parameters.description: true to generate MapStruct mapper interfaces

parameters.name: generateAdapters
parameters.description: true to generate port adapter implementations

parameters.name: generateEmbeddables
parameters.description: true to generate JPA embeddable classes for value objects
